S

Scroll - Class in microui.component
A scrollbar component with a draggable thumb for selecting values within a range.
Scroll() - Constructor for class microui.component.Scroll
Constructs a Scroll with default maximum size, centered on the screen.
Scroll(float, float, float, float) - Constructor for class microui.component.Scroll
Constructs a Scroll with specified position and dimensions.
Scrollable - Interface in microui.core.interfaces
Interface for components that can respond to mouse wheel scroll events.
selectAll() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Selects all text in the document.
set(float) - Method in class microui.util.BoundedValue
Sets the current value.
set(float, float, float) - Method in class microui.util.BoundedValue
Sets all parameters (min, max, and value) at once.

Sets the text content, replacing any existing text.
set(String) - Method in class microui.core.controller.SingleLineTextController
Sets the text content, replacing any existing text.

Copies text to the clipboard.

Copies an array of strings to the clipboard as newline-separated text.

Sets the text content from a StringBuilder, replacing any existing text.

Sets the image directly from a PImage object.
setAbsoluteBounds(float, float, float, float) - Method in class microui.core.base.ContentView
Change bounds using margin. this method can change real bounds, but it's don't ignore constrain system.

Copies absolute bounds from another ContentView.

Copies absolute dimensions from another ContentView.

Sets the absolute height (including padding and margin).

Sets the absolute position (including margin).

Copies absolute position from another ContentView.
setAbsoluteSize(float, float) - Method in class microui.core.base.ContentView
Resize using margin. this method can change real width and height but it's don't ignore constrain system.

Sets the absolute width (including padding and margin).

Sets the absolute x-coordinate (including margin).
setAbsoluteY(float) - Method in class microui.core.base.ContentView
Sets the absolute y-coordinate (including margin).

Sets the text content and automatically adjusts tooltip size.
setText(String...) - Method in class microui.component.TextArea
Sets the text content of the text area.

Sets the text content from an array of lines.
setText(String...) - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Sets the text content from an array of strings (each string becomes a line).
setText(StringBuilder) - Method in class microui.component.TextField
Sets the text content from a StringBuilder.

Sets the horizontal alignment of the button's text.
setTextAlignY(int) - Method in class microui.component.Button
Sets the vertical alignment of the button's text.

Sets the color of the button's text.

Sets the color of the label text.

Sets the text color.

Sets the text color.
setTextColor(AbstractColor) - Method in class microui.component.TextView
Sets the text color.
setTextColor(AbstractColor) - Method in class microui.feedback.TextTooltipContent
Sets the text color of the tooltip.

Enables or disables text length constraint.

Sets text identifier for this View object.

Sets the text size in pixels.

Sets the manual text size (used when auto-resize is disabled).

Sets the text size in pixels.

Sets the text size.

Sets the visibility of the button's text.
setTextVisible(boolean) - Method in class microui.component.LabeledCheckBox
Sets the visibility of the label text.

Sets the current theme for all UI components.
setThumbColor(AbstractColor) - Method in class microui.component.Scroll
Sets the background color of the thumb.
setThumbHoverColor(AbstractColor) - Method in class microui.component.Scroll
Sets the color of the hover effect on the thumb.
setThumbHoverEnabled(boolean) - Method in class microui.component.Scroll
Enables or disables hover effects on the thumb.
setThumbHoverSpeed(float) - Method in class microui.component.Scroll
Sets the animation speed of the hover effect on the thumb.
setThumbRipplesColor(AbstractColor) - Method in class microui.component.Scroll
Sets the color of the ripple effects on the thumb.
setThumbRipplesEnabled(boolean) - Method in class microui.component.Scroll
Enables or disables ripple effects on the thumb.
setThumbSizeRatio(float) - Method in class microui.component.Scroll
Sets the ratio that determines the thumb size relative to the track.
setThumbStrokeColor(AbstractColor) - Method in class microui.component.Scroll
Sets the stroke color (border color) of the thumb.
setThumbStrokeWeight(int) - Method in class microui.component.Scroll
Sets the stroke weight (border thickness) of the thumb.

Sets a text tooltip for this component (convenience method).
setTooltip(Tooltip) - Method in class microui.feedback.TooltipContent
Sets the Tooltip that contains this content.
setTooltip(Tooltip) - Static method in class microui.service.TooltipManager
Sets the current tooltip to display.
setTooltip(TooltipContent) - Method in class microui.core.base.Component
Sets the tooltip content for this component.
setValidationEnabled(boolean) - Method in class microui.component.TextField
Enables or disables input validation.
setValidationEnabled(boolean) - Method in class microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController
Enables or disables text validation.
setValidationMode(FullSingleLineTextController.ValidationMode) - Method in class microui.component.TextField
Sets the validation mode for text input.
setValidationMode(FullSingleLineTextController.ValidationMode) - Method in class microui.core.controller.FullSingleLineTextController
Sets the validation mode for text input.
setValue(float) - Method in class microui.core.RangeControl
Sets the current value of the range control.
setValue(float, float, float) - Method in class microui.core.RangeControl
Sets the range and current value of the control.
setVerticalMode(boolean) - Method in class microui.layout.LinearLayout
Sets the orientation mode of the layout.
setVisible(boolean) - Method in class microui.core.base.View
Sets the visibility of the element.
setVisible(boolean) - Method in class microui.core.BufferedView
Sets the visibility of the view.
setVisible(boolean) - Method in interface microui.core.interfaces.Visible
Sets the visibility state of the component.
setWeight(float) - Method in class microui.core.style.Stroke
Sets the stroke weight (thickness).
setWeight(int) - Method in class microui.core.effect.PlainShadow
Sets uniform shadow weight for all sides.
setWeight(int, int) - Method in class microui.core.effect.PlainShadow
Sets shadow weight for horizontal and vertical sides separately.
setWeight(int, int, int, int) - Method in class microui.core.effect.PlainShadow
Sets individual shadow weights for each side.
setWeightBottom(int) - Method in class microui.core.effect.PlainShadow
Sets the bottom shadow weight.
setWeightLeft(int) - Method in class microui.core.effect.PlainShadow
Sets the left shadow weight.
setWeightRight(int) - Method in class microui.core.effect.PlainShadow
Sets the right shadow weight.
setWeightTop(int) - Method in class microui.core.effect.PlainShadow
Sets the top shadow weight.

Sets the width with constraint validation.
setWidthFrom(SpatialView) - Method in class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Sets the width from another SpatialView.

Sets the x-coordinate.
setXFrom(SpatialView) - Method in class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Sets the x-coordinate from another SpatialView.
setY(float) - Method in class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Sets the y-coordinate.
setYFrom(SpatialView) - Method in class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Sets the y-coordinate from another SpatialView.
SingleLineTextController - Class in microui.core.controller
Controller for managing single-line text input with validation and event listeners.
SingleLineTextController() - Constructor for class microui.core.controller.SingleLineTextController
Constructs a SingleLineTextController with empty initial text.
SingleLineTextController(String) - Constructor for class microui.core.controller.SingleLineTextController
Constructs a SingleLineTextController with initial text.
SKY - Static variable in class microui.core.style.Color
Sky blue color (green + blue).
SLIDE_BOTTOM - Enum constant in enum class microui.core.base.ContainerManager.AnimatorMode
Slide animation from bottom to top.
SLIDE_LEFT - Enum constant in enum class microui.core.base.ContainerManager.AnimatorMode
Slide animation from left to right.
SLIDE_RANDOM - Enum constant in enum class microui.core.base.ContainerManager.AnimatorMode
Random slide animation direction.
SLIDE_RIGHT - Enum constant in enum class microui.core.base.ContainerManager.AnimatorMode
Slide animation from right to left.
SLIDE_TOP - Enum constant in enum class microui.core.base.ContainerManager.AnimatorMode
Slide animation from top to bottom.
Slider - Class in microui.component
A slider component for selecting values within a linear range.
Slider() - Constructor for class microui.component.Slider
Constructs a Slider with default maximum size, centered on the screen.
Slider(float, float, float, float) - Constructor for class microui.component.Slider
Constructs a Slider with specified position and dimensions.
SLOW - Enum constant in enum class microui.core.base.SpatialView.HooksUpdateMode
Hooks are called approximately every 64ms (~15fps).
SMALL - Enum constant in enum class microui.constants.AutoResizeMode
Small text size - compact text for limited space.
SpatialAnimator - Class in microui.core.effect
Animator for smooth interpolation of spatial properties (position and dimensions) between states.
SpatialAnimator(ContentView, ContentView, BooleanSupplier) - Constructor for class microui.core.effect.SpatialAnimator
Constructs a SpatialAnimator with both starting and ending ContentViews.
SpatialAnimator(ContentView, SpatialState, BooleanSupplier) - Constructor for class microui.core.effect.SpatialAnimator
Constructs a SpatialAnimator with a starting ContentView and ending SpatialState.
SpatialAnimator(SpatialState, ContentView, BooleanSupplier) - Constructor for class microui.core.effect.SpatialAnimator
Constructs a SpatialAnimator with a starting SpatialState and ending ContentView.
SpatialAnimator(SpatialState, SpatialState, BooleanSupplier) - Constructor for class microui.core.effect.SpatialAnimator
Constructs a SpatialAnimator with SpatialState objects and a condition.
SpatialAnimator.ReactionMode - Enum Class in microui.core.effect
Reaction modes for controlling animation triggering behavior.
SpatialState - Record Class in microui.util
Immutable record representing the spatial state of a view.
SpatialState(float, float, float, float) - Constructor for record class microui.util.SpatialState
Creates an instance of a SpatialState record class.
SpatialState(SpatialView) - Constructor for record class microui.util.SpatialState
Constructs a SpatialState from a SpatialView.
SpatialState(SpatialState) - Constructor for record class microui.util.SpatialState
Copy constructor for SpatialState.
SpatialView - Class in microui.core.base
Abstract base class for GUI components that have spatial properties (position and dimensions).
SpatialView() - Constructor for class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Constructs a SpatialView at origin (0,0) with default minimum size.
SpatialView(float, float, float, float) - Constructor for class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Constructs a SpatialView with specified position and dimensions.
SpatialView(SpatialView) - Constructor for class microui.core.base.SpatialView
Constructs a SpatialView by copying properties from another SpatialView.
SpatialView.HooksUpdateMode - Enum Class in microui.core.base
Update modes for change hooks with different timing intervals.
splitLine() - Method in class microui.core.TextEditorModel
Splits the current line at the cursor position, creating a new line.
splitLine(int, int) - Method in class microui.core.controller.MultiLineTextController
Splits a line at the specified column position.
START - Static variable in class microui.util.Timer
Starting value of the timer (0%).
STRICT - Enum constant in enum class microui.RendererConfig.Mode
Strict rendering mode.
Stroke - Class in microui.core.style
Represents a stroke style with color and weight properties for drawing outlines.
Stroke() - Constructor for class microui.core.style.Stroke
Constructs a Stroke with default theme color and weight.
Stroke(float) - Constructor for class microui.core.style.Stroke
Constructs a Stroke with specified weight and theme color.
Stroke(AbstractColor) - Constructor for class microui.core.style.Stroke
Constructs a Stroke with specified color and default weight.
Stroke(AbstractColor, float) - Constructor for class microui.core.style.Stroke
Constructs a Stroke with specified color and weight.
swapOrientation() - Method in class microui.component.Scroll
Swaps the orientation of the scrollbar (horizontal to vertical or vice versa).
swapOrientation() - Method in class microui.component.Slider
Swaps the orientation of the slider (horizontal to vertical or vice versa).
swapOrientation() - Method in class microui.core.LinearRangeControl
Swaps the current orientation (horizontal в†” vertical).
switchOn(int) - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Switches to a container by its numeric ID.
switchOn(int, ContainerManager.AnimatorMode) - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Switches to a container by its numeric ID with a specific animation mode.
switchOn(String) - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Switches to a container by its text ID.
switchOn(String, ContainerManager.AnimatorMode) - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Switches to a container by its text ID with a specific animation mode.
switchOn(Container) - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Switches to the specified container with animation.
switchOn(Container, ContainerManager.AnimatorMode) - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Switches to the specified container with a specific animation mode.
switchOnNext() - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Switches to the next container in the list (circular navigation).
switchOnPrevious() - Method in class microui.core.base.ContainerManager
Switches to the previous container in the list (circular navigation).
